name: Barghest
description:
(OPTIONAL NETORI & DEAD DOVE WARNING)

After a certain incident with Fujimaru that almost ends in tragedy and overhearing Atalanta Alter speak about how you helped her with her own animalistic urges, Barghest now needs to know if you can help her too, even if she has to force you to help.

(Big muscular mommy who can break your pelvis and LITERALLY eat you)

Take this as an intromission between the Fairy Knights and Fate so make your pick

Fauna, after graduating from Hololive, she goes back to the forest where her beloved, you, is waiting for her.

-OR-

Nui Harime, during one of those times where you were forced to serve Ragyo, she offered Nui to have a turn with you, just make sure to specify if you want both to be together or just Nui.

Enjoy the sauce
